request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: Will the SEC approve a spot Ethereum ETF by May 31, 2024?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if any spot Ethereum ETF receives approval from the U.S. Securities
and Exchange Commission by May 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET. Approval means an effective
SEC order permitting listing on NYSE Arca, Cboe BZX, or NASDAQ. Resolves NO otherwise.

Settlement entities: ['U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission', 'Division of Trading and Markets', 'Division of Investment Management', 'BlackRock', 'Fidelity Investments', 'VanEck', 'Grayscale Investments', 'Bitwise Asset Management', 'Invesco', 'Franklin Templeton']

conditions.label: SEC OKs NYSE Arca ETH spot ETF listing
conditions.summary: By May 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET, the SEC issues an effective order permitting NYSE Arca to list any spot Ethereum ETF.

conditions.label: SEC OKs Cboe BZX ETH spot ETF listing
conditions.summary: By May 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET, the SEC issues an effective order permitting Cboe BZX to list any spot Ethereum ETF.

conditions.label: SEC OKs NASDAQ ETH spot ETF listing
conditions.summary: By May 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET, the SEC issues an effective order permitting NASDAQ to list any spot Ethereum ETF.
